name: Verification Discipline
description: No completion claims without fresh verification evidence in current context

name: TDD Discipline
description: No production code without a failing test first — delete and restart on violation

name: Debugging Discipline
description: No fixes without root cause investigation — 3 fails means escalate

name: Receiving Review Discipline
description: Read every comment and verify the claim — no performative agreement

name: Anti-Rationalization Discipline
description: Cross-cutting enforcement: even 1% chance a discipline applies means MUST follow it

name: Security Awareness Discipline
description: Every agent is a security agent — universal checklist on every action

name: CEO Approval Discipline
description: Major efforts require formal CEO approval — no exceptions

name: Context Engineering Discipline
description: Feed the right information at the right time — 5-level hierarchy with trust levels

name: Source Verification Discipline
description: Confidence is not evidence — verify every framework decision against official docs
